title: ginkgo biloba var. aurea
intro: Ginkgo biloba var. aurea, a variety of the ancient ginkgo tree, is a deciduous plant known for its unique fan-shaped leaves and golden-yellow autumn hues. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the leaves of the ginkgo biloba var. aurea contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to possess medicinal properties that improve blood circulation and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of ginkgo biloba var. aurea include enhanced memory and cognitive function, improved blood flow to the brain and extremities, and potential relief from symptoms of menopause and tinnitus. Ginkgo biloba var. aurea is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and can also be consumed as a dietary supplement.
